title: BenchmarkCaseGroundTruth
description: Schema for the expected outputs of each workflow stage (ground_truth.json).

case_id.description: Must match the case_id in input.json.

transcription_cleaned.description: Stage 1 output: cleaned, readable version of the patient transcript.

clinical_summary.description: Stage 2 output: concise clinical summary suitable for physician review.

differential_diagnosis.description: Stage 3 output: ranked list of differential diagnoses, each backed by a PubMed citation.

pmid.description: PubMed ID of the supporting citation, or null if not yet found.

rationale.description: One-sentence explanation of why this condition is on the differential.

normalized_medications.description: Stage 4 output: each medication mapped to its RxNorm concept.

original.description: Medication name as it appeared in medication_list.

rxnorm_id.description: RxNorm CUI, or null if not yet resolved.

drug_interactions.description: Stage 5 output: clinically significant drug-drug interactions identified via NIH RxNav.

subjective.description: Patient's reported symptoms and history in their own words.

plan.description: Proposed treatment, follow-up, and patient instructions.
